scripts.deploy:admin: npm run admin:build && firebase deploy --only hosting:admin
scripts.deploy:functions: npm run backend:build && firebase deploy --only functions
scripts.deploy:all: npm run backend:build && npm run admin:build && firebase deploy
scripts.emulators: cd backend/functions && npm run build && cd ../.. && firebase emulators:start --import=.emulator-data --export-on-exit=.emulator-data
scripts.install:all: npm run backend:install && npm run admin:install
